title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down four strategies that Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan uses to ship code rapidly with Claude Code: giving Claude a role, running parallel sessions, building custom tools, and planning before building. Marchese highlights one strategy generating online criticism and identifies another as the key differentiator.
